meta.title: App & Booking | PADEL2GO – Game-Changing Padel Experience
meta.description: The PADEL2GO app: court booking, score tracking, player profiles, league integration and loyalty – all in one app. Get the game-changing padel experience now.

hero.description: With the PADEL2GO app you get everything you need for your padel experience: book courts, track results, find players and collect rewards – all in one place.

features.subtitle: From booking to loyalty program – every feature for your perfect padel experience.

items.title: Court booking
items.description: Book courts at every Padel2Go location in real time – flexible, fast and hassle-free.

items.title: Score tracking & AI analysis
items.description: Log your results, tap into AI performance analysis and find everything about your stats.

items.title: Player profiles
items.description: Your personal profile with match history, statistics and your current skill level.

items.title: League
items.description: Rankings, fixtures and results – all right inside the app.

items.title: P2G Wallet
items.description: Keep track of your P2G Points: earn points, check your status and redeem rewards.

items.title: Matching tool
items.description: Find players for your next match: set your availability and get matched automatically.

steps.subtitle: You've never made it onto the padel court this fast.

items.title: Pick a location
items.description: Find your nearest Padel2Go location or choose your favorite court from the list of all locations.

items.title: Pick a slot
items.description: See availability in real time and choose the date, time and duration for your next match.

items.title: Pay & play
items.description: Secure payment right in the app with all common payment methods – and off you go to the court!

ai.description: Together with Wingfield we're bringing AI-powered game analysis to the padel court. Your game is captured, analyzed and evaluated live via cameras – for maximum insights and continuous improvement.

items.title: Live camera tracking
items.description: Your game is captured and analyzed live via cameras – no manual input required.

items.title: Distance tracking
items.description: Automatically capture the distance you cover per match and compare yourself with other players.

items.title: Zone coverage
items.description: Analyze your positioning on the court – where do you stand most often, where should you be more active?

items.title: Video highlights
items.description: Automatically generated highlight clips of your best rallies to share and analyze.

items.title: AI-powered game analysis
items.description: Personal tips and insights to improve your game based on your match data.

items.title: Shot analysis
items.description: Detailed analysis of your shot patterns: serves, parejas, lobs, bandeja and more – spot your strengths and weaknesses.

ai.howItWorksText: Cameras are installed at our locations that capture your game automatically. The AI analysis runs in the background and delivers detailed statistics, heatmaps and personalized improvement tips straight to the app after every match. No manual input, no sensors – just play and learn.
ai.footnote: These features are in development and will roll out in the app step by step. Stay tuned – the future of padel tracking is coming!
